div.h2: Phase 0 — So Where Should We Go?
div.p: Each member pitches their ideal destination 400 tokens/person
Phil → Claire → Haley → Alex → Luke → Manny

div.h2: Phase 1 — Wait, That's a Terrible Idea
div.p: React to others' proposals — name names, be specific 500 tokens/person
Phil → Claire → Haley → Alex → Luke → Manny
Propose compromises and alliances, find overlap 500 tokens/person
Phil → Claire → Haley → Alex → Luke → Manny

div.h2: Phase 3 — Can We All Just Agree?
div.p: State non-negotiables and what you'd give up 400 tokens/person
Luke → Manny → Haley → Alex → Claire → Phil (kids speak first)
Claire announces, Phil backs it up, kids react 600 tokens (parents) / 300 tokens (kids)
Claire → Phil → Haley → Alex → Luke → Manny (asymmetric prompts: parents decide, kids react)
